name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Gold buckle💞💞YSL classic legendary fashion meets romance❓YSL's original leather texture possesses such attributes. Can't describe how charming it is, it has a magic that attracts you. It is a basic essential in many women's wardrobes, allowing you to create a simple and textured look with plenty of embellishment💋Size: 24 Model 1964
